raw_consumer_statement: I paid for a portion ( {$800.00} ) of my family 's meal that was charged to my sister 's room at the Hilton XXXX on XX/XX/2023. However the next day an additional unauthorized charge of {$400.00} was made on XX/XX/XXXX. My flight departed XXXX on the XXXX and I did not authorize the {$400.00} charge.
